columns.name: year
columns.desc: The specific school or academic year that the enrollment data was collected.

columns.name: ncessch
columns.desc: The 12-digit unique national public school ID used to cross-reference school directory details.

columns.name: enrollment
columns.desc: The total integer count of students enrolled in this specific subcategory slice.

columns.name: leaid
columns.desc: The 7-digit unique Local Education Agency ID mapping the school directly to its school district.

columns.name: grade
columns.desc: The specific student grade level or instructional level category for the enrollment count.

columns.name: race
columns.desc: The demographic or racial/ethnic category of the student population for the reported school enrollment count (e.g., White, Black, Hispanic, Asian, American Indian).

columns.name: sex
columns.desc: The demographic student gender category used to filter the student counts.
